name: Paper Figure
description: Clean academic schematic figures with white background, thin vector linework, restrained teal-blue-orange accents, clear arrows, sparse labels, and publication-ready spacing. Optimized for one focused concept per image.
template:
Create a clean, publication-ready academic figure about: {prompt}

Style requirements:
- white background with generous whitespace
- vector-style schematic or conceptual diagram
- thin crisp line art and precise geometry
- restrained accent palette using teal, blue, and orange
- clear directional arrows, labels, annotations, and callouts
- light soft highlights only where helpful, no heavy shading
- polished conference-paper figure aesthetic
- balanced composition with readable structure and modular blocks
- suitable for a machine learning, signal processing, or scientific paper
- focus on exactly one main idea in this image
- use only 3 to 5 major visual blocks unless the prompt explicitly asks for more
- keep in-image text sparse, short, and label-like
- prefer visual structure over long explanations

Avoid:
- photorealism
- dark background
- painterly textures
- cluttered composition
- decorative gradients dominating the image
- comic or cartoon styling
